# .NET Version Upgrade Progress

Upgrading SearchComparisonNet (3 SDK-style projects) from .NET 7 to .NET 10 using an All-at-Once strategy. All NuGet packages are updated to their latest compatible versions and Central Package Management is adopted.

**Progress**: 2/2 tasks complete <progress value="100" max="100"></progress> 100%

## Tasks

- ✅ 03-upgrade-to-net10: Retarget all projects to .NET 10 and update packages ([Content](tasks/03-upgrade-to-net10/task.md), [Progress](tasks/03-upgrade-to-net10/progress-details.md))
- 🔄 03-upgrade-to-net10: Retarget all projects to .NET 10 and update packages ([Content](tasks/03-upgrade-to-net10/task.md))
- ✅ 04-final-validation: Build solution and run test suite ([Content](tasks/04-final-validation/task.md), [Progress](tasks/04-final-validation/progress-details.md))
